summary: Fair‑quality, a bit cluttered mix captures a memorable second set highlighted by an emotional So Many Roads and a fiery Scarlet>Fire jam.
review: The recording offers a modest sound with a somewhat crowded mix and occasionally hot vocals, but the performance shines on a long second set. Highlights include a tear‑jerking So Many Roads, an uplifting Promised Land, a fast‑fire Scarlet>Fire segue, and a spacious Terrapin jam, all underscored by Jerry’s inspired guitar work.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show is praised for several standout moments but the mix is described as cluttered, leading to an overall middling rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix feels a bit cluttered and vocals are hot at times; no specific source (soundboard/audience) mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A long, atmospheric second set with quiet, dark space sections and strong jams that keep the energy flowing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Plays fast on Scarlet>Fire segue, sounds like Carlos during Watchtower intro; overall praised for his guitar work.
